forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+description: 'Editor-style check-on-save for agents: the file change (not the tool call) triggers structured LSP diagnostics, delivered inline in the write op''s result and via a pull `diagnostics` MCP tool. Central invariant: ONE LSP client system. code-context already drives rust-analyzer (LspJsonRpcClient/SharedLspClient + its own get_diagnostics) — diagnostics must UNIFY onto a single shared client owned by swissarmyhammer-lsp, never spawn a second. Spine: (A) invert the lsp↔code-context dependency and promote swissarmyhammer-lsp to the one LSP system (single session per workspace+server, shared open-document set, publishDiagnostics fan-out); (B) new swissarmyhammer-diagnostics crate (settle/debounce, report types, diagnose API); (C) diagnostics MCP tool + inline-on-edit; (D) cross-process leader arbitration + request multiplexer (deferred-overlapping with rebuild-index IPC); (E) llama-agent ACP/push delivery; (F) closing the write surface via host config. Basis: ideas/diagnostic.md.'
+name: 'Diagnostics: Check-on-Save for Agents'
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,2 +0,0 @@
-description: 'Editor-style check-on-save for agents: the file change (not the tool call) triggers structured LSP diagnostics, delivered inline in the write op''s result and via a pull `diagnostics` MCP tool. Central invariant: ONE LSP client system. code-context already drives rust-analyzer (LspJsonRpcClient/SharedLspClient + its own get_diagnostics) — diagnostics must UNIFY onto a single shared client owned by swissarmyhammer-lsp, never spawn a second. Spine: (A) invert the lsp↔code-context dependency and promote swissarmyhammer-lsp to the one LSP system (single session per workspace+server, shared open-document set, publishDiagnostics fan-out); (B) new swissarmyhammer-diagnostics crate (settle/debounce, report types, diagnose API); (C) diagnostics MCP tool + inline-on-edit; (D) cross-process leader arbitration + request multiplexer (deferred-overlapping with rebuild-index IPC); (E) llama-agent ACP/push delivery; (F) closing the write surface via host config. Basis: ideas/diagnostic.md.'
-name: 'Diagnostics: Check-on-Save for Agents'
